input.background: We have established that Wechsler Adult Intelligence Scores (WAISs) vary according to a Normal distribution with μ=100 and σ=15.
input.question: What effect does increasing the sample size have on the precision of a mean?

output.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量
output.answer: Each time, quadrupling the sample size cuts the SE_{\bar{x}} in half.

WAIS_mean.description: The mean of the Wechsler Adult Intelligence Scores (WAIS) distribution.

WAIS_std_dev.description: The standard deviation of the Wechsler Adult Intelligence Scores (WAIS) distribution.

sample_size.description: The size of the sample drawn from the WAIS distribution.

precision_of_mean.description: The precision of the sample mean, which is affected by the sample size.

meta_info.caption: Standard error of the mean and sample size (WAIS).
